Schema 0xe040 u32[7]=0x08 = key-comparison-rules selector (8 -> CmsRulesPARENT_CHILD_LINK; NOT a bitfield, E50); value-overlaps-key is a caller-side same-buffer construction (AddParentChildLink), not a schema flag. Hard-link groups verified: names sharing the same (home, ordinal) appear as separate type-0x30 rows in DIFFERENT parent directories (e.g. specials image home=0x702 ord=6 shared by 7 names across 7 parent dirs). 180 such groups on win10refs2tspecials; 35003 group-keys corpus-wide.
